CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE BANNER DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, 1140 PAGE ST, LLC and MICHAEL CASSIDY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts showing malice oppression or fraud as to each defendant. Moving party and its attorney is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rios Merida, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Continued To Jan-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
